headline: US strikes Iran again, reinstates naval blockade near Strait of Hormuz
gist: US hit Iranian coastal/military targets again; naval blockade of Iran's ports reinstated after tanker attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. WTI +0.69%, Brent ~+0.7%, Hormuz tanker transits down ~60%.

headline: Nifty IT pack pressured after weak IBM guidance
gist: TCS, Infosys, HCL Tech under pressure after weak IBM guidance spooked global tech-services demand overnight.

headline: Gold slips as oil-driven Fed rate-hike repricing offsets soft CPI
gist: Gold down ~0.93% as oil-led Fed-hike repricing offsets yesterday's soft US CPI print; PPI and Fed's Warsh testimony due later today.

headline: Natural gas near 2-month low on mild weather, storage surplus
gist: Nat gas trend soft on mild-weather outlook, comfortable storage surplus, and Freeport LNG maintenance cutting feedgas demand; intraday price still up 0.86% today.

headline: Nifty's intraday gain fades toward flat on IT weakness, crude-driven inflation risk
gist: Nifty gapped up on positive global cues, high near 24,220, but gains moderated through the day as IT weakness and crude/Iran risk weighed; closed the window +0.10%.
